questions.question: Select the sentence containing the homonym of the highlighted word: The army retreated to their strategic bases before launching a counterattack.
options: She applied two coats of makeup bases before the foundation.
Allied forces established new bases along the coastline.
The soldiers returned to their airforce bases for regrouping.
The navy had to defend its remaining overseas bases.
questions.answer: She applied two coats of makeup bases before the foundation.
questions.explanation: Option A: She applied two coats of makeup bases before the foundation. fits the requirement of the question. Option B: Allied forces established new bases along the coastline. does not best fit the requirement of the question. Option C: The soldiers returned to their airforce bases for regrouping. does not best fit the requirement of the question. Option D: The navy had to defend its remaining overseas bases. does not best fit the requirement of the question. **Option A** correctly applies: it is the opposite in meaning to the target word.
